headline: Looking Ahead to the 2026 Q2 Earnings Season
summary: As we wade closer to the 2026 Q2 earnings season, the overall earnings picture remains strong and broad-based, with the recent 2026 Q1 cycle aligning nicely with the positive trend.

headline: Avient Expands Therma-Tech Portfolio With New Graphite Grades
summary: Avient launches eight new natural graphite Therma-Tech grades, targeting lighter, lower-cost thermal management with sustainability benefits.
